name: x1
long_description: x1 is an AI app builder that helps anyone create real, App Store-ready iOS apps. Users start with a structured product plan, design polished iPhone screens in a visual canvas, build features step by step, and prepare launch assets like App Store listings, screenshots, monetization, and analytics. Instead of generating one-shot AI demos, x1 gives builders a guided system for turning an idea into a real app.
one_liner: AI App Builder for iOS Apps
